source_metadata.title: 2025/09/11 - PP
source_metadata.description:
Thursday, 11 September 2025 | Primary Production Committee

Petition of Ian Sizer: Madagascar Ragwort – A growing concern for Northland and the rest of New Zealand

Hearing of Evidence
Ian Sizer
Geoff Crawford, Northland Regional Council Chair
Pāmu Landcorp Farming Limited
- Mark Leslie, Chief Executive
- Will Burrett, Chief Operating Officer
- Kara Tait, Head of Comms & Engagement
